title: French Delight Macaron Cake
description: A delicate French-inspired dessert featuring macarons and gruyère cheese. Perfect for a special occasion.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300°F (150°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Sift the confectioners' sugar into a large bowl.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs and vanilla extract.
Add the sifted confectioners' sugar to the egg mixture and whisk until smooth.
Add the softened butter and mix until combined.
Transfer the mixture to a piping bag and pipe onto the prepared baking sheet.
Tap the baking sheet gently to remove any air bubbles.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until the edges are lightly golden.
Allow the macarons to cool completely on the baking sheet.
To assemble the cake, place a layer of macarons on a serving plate.
Spread a layer of gruyère cheese on top of the macarons.
Repeat the layers one more time, finishing with a layer of macarons on top.
